cartoboost_lag.auto_selector_policy: auto uses the lag spine unless shared validation clears the source-specific gain and consistency guards; non-M inner validation skips raw auto and non-M outer scoring materializes raw auto only when selected; rolling-origin suites cache identical inner validation cutoffs by source, cutoff, and candidate roster
cartoboost_lag.native_covariate_policy: use route static covariates and covariate-calendar interactions only when enabled by the source-specific benchmark config
cartoboost_lag.native_feature_policy: season-aware lags, rolling means, lag deltas, and rolling trends capped to the shortest training series
cartoboost_lag.native_target_mode_policy: delta_from_last when season_length == 12, horizon == 13, or horizon >= 24; level otherwise
cartoboost_lag.native_tree_regularization_policy: use at least max_depth=5 and at most min_samples_leaf=6 when horizon >= 24 or season_length == 4; otherwise use configured values
